_comment: Demo Lab — installer manifests. Each entry: an installable asset paired with target env capabilities. v1 opens the right deploy portal with pre-filled params; v2 will do headless install via pac CLI / Azure CLI. Asset cards in Resource Hub use these to render the 'Install to env' button.

installers.name: RAPP Backend → Azure Function
installers.description: Deploy the RAPP Python Azure Function backend (agents + endpoints) to your Azure subscription with one click.
prerequisites: OpenAI API key or Azure OpenAI endpoint

installers.name: Contact Center IQ → D365 CE
installers.description: AI-powered conversation trending dashboard with topic classification, D3.js charts, and embedded Copilot Studio agent.
prerequisites: D365 environment with Customer Service installed
post_install: Configure Cloud Flow frequency (15 min recommended)
Set email recipient for intelligence reports
Add to Contact Center app sitemap

installers.name: D365 Agent Home → D365 CE
installers.description: Modern Horizon-design agent homepage — live Dataverse data, presence tracking, team panel, quick actions.
prerequisites: D365 environment with Customer Service workspace
post_install: Add maulabs_agent_home web resource to Contact Center app sitemap
Set as default page for agent role

installers.name: Chat Widget Studio → Azure Static Apps
installers.description: Visual D365 Omnichannel chat widget builder. Embed or deploy standalone.

installers.name: Modern SLA Timer PCF → D365 CE
installers.description: Animated donut SLA timer for D365 Case forms. Replaces the default timer.
prerequisites: Case entity with SLA KPIs configured
post_install: Add SLA Timer PCF control to Case form
Bind to SLA KPI Instance entity

installers.name: Mfg Copilot Studio Template → Copilot Studio
installers.description: Pre-built Copilot Studio agent template with Discrete Mfg topics (warranty, service request, asset lookup). Imports via YAML.
prerequisites: Power Platform environment with Copilot Studio
post_install: Publish agent to Teams or web channel
